name: odoo-doodba-dev
description: Professional Odoo development toolkit for Doodba containers. USE AUTOMATICALLY for ANY Odoo development task: creating/modifying modules, models, fields, views, security, tests; searching Odoo code; debugging; validating references. v2.0 features: fast code indexer (95% faster), unified agents (developer, verifier, documenter, setup), smart workflows (auto-detects complexity), streamlined commands (/odoo-dev, /odoo-search, /odoo-setup, /odoo-scaffold, /odoo-test). AUTO-TRIGGER on keywords: odoo, doodba, addon, module, sale.order, res.partner, Many2one, _inherit, __manifest__.py, invoke, xmlid, form view, tree view. ONE COMMAND for all development: /odoo-dev
